phases.name: XML Output Parity
phases.notes: PoiXmlWriter and XML parity fixtures/tests are present.

phases.name: Minimal xlsx Write
phases.notes: XSSFWorkbook/XSSFSheet/XSSFRow/XSSFCell can write string and numeric cells.

phases.name: xlsx Read
phases.notes: Basic shared string, inline string, and numeric cell read path is present.

phases.name: Styles & Formatting
phases.notes: Initial Phase 2 support for cell styles, fonts, indexed colors, fills, borders, built-in formats, and custom number formats.

phases.name: Images & Drawing
phases.notes: XSSF image embedding slice is present: addPicture, createDrawingPatriarch, XSSFClientAnchor, XSSFDrawing, XSSFPicture, and package relationships.

phases.name: SS Common Interface
phases.notes: IWorkbook, ISheet, IRow, ICell, ICellStyle, IFont, ICreationHelper, IDataFormat, IPictureData defined in DotnetPoi.SS. BorderStyle, FillPatternType, IndexedColors, CellType moved to SS. All XSSF classes implement the interfaces via explicit interface implementation.

phases.name: Image Rotation
phases.notes: XSSFPicture.setRotation()/getRotation() in degrees; writes rot attribute on <a:xfrm> in 60000ths-of-a-degree OOXML units. Drawing XML parsed on workbook load to restore shapes, anchors, and rotation. Interop tested: C# writes rotated fixture, Java POI reads and verifies rot=5400000.

phases.name: Agile Encryption
phases.notes: Initial Agile write/decrypt slice is present: AES-128/SHA-1 agile password verifier, chunked EncryptedPackage encryption, HMAC metadata, OpenMcdf-backed CFB wrapper, XSSFWorkbook.writeEncrypted, and POI interop read test for a password-protected xlsx. Excel-compatible integrity HMAC details and OpenMcdf removal handoff are documented in PHASE_3_4_AGILE_ENCRYPTION_NOTES.md.

classes.notes: Workbook read/write exists; Phase 2 style table APIs are present.
String/numeric values and cell style assignment exist. Formulas remain Phase 5.
Initial Phase 2 subset: font, data format, fill foreground/pattern, and borders.
Initial Phase 2 subset: name, height, indexed color, bold, italic, strikeout, underline.
Built-in formats plus custom formats starting at POI's first user-defined index.
Cell-based anchors and anchor type are ported for picture creation.
Picture creation and drawing/image relationships are ported; charts, comments, shapes, and object data remain unported.
Picture shape metadata is present for OOXML serialization; resize APIs remain unported.
Picture bytes, content type, extension, and basic readback are ported.
